rulings.Case Title: STRATEGIC OUT SOURCE VS. EXECUTIVE DIRECTION, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE DIRECTION, INC. DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT DEMURRER-OVERRULE 1. AS TO 1ST, 6HT, 11TH, 13TH & 14TH CAUSE OF ACTIONS 2. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND-2ND & 3RD CAUSE OF ACTIONS FAILS TO ALLEGE STANDING, ALSO PRACTICAL & POLICY REASONS WHY CLAIMS ARE TO BE BROUGHT IN SEPARATE ACTION.SEE BABB V. SUP.CT. 3C38841 3. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND-4TH & 5TH CAUSE OF ACTIONS TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY, 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD INTANGIBLE WAS REPRESENTED BY DOCUMENT. (302/REQ/PB)
